odeProperty.value: STEP BY STEP: CREATING A DIGITAL RECIPE BOOK
Se trata de una situación de aprendizaje en la que se trabajar los textos instructivos, el uso del imperativo, los conectores de secuencia y el vocabulario relacionado con la cocina y la comida.

odePagStructure.blockName: STEP BY STEP: CREATING A DIGITAL RECIPE BOOK

odeComponent.htmlView:
In this learning situation, you will learn how to write instructional texts in English using imperative verbs and sequence connectors. You will create and present a digital recipe book using Canva.

Subject: English

Level: ESPA II

Duration: 6 hours

Final product: Digital Recipe Book

More information about the project
odeComponent.jsonProperties:
{"ideviceId":"20260611121626153M2A","textInfoDurationInput":"","textInfoDurationTextInput":"Duración","textInfoParticipantsInput":"","textInfoParticipantsTextInput":"Agrupamiento","textTextarea":"

In this learning situation, you will learn how to write instructional texts in English using imperative verbs and sequence connectors. You will create and present a digital recipe book using Canva.

Subject: English

Level: ESPA II

Duration: 6 hours

Final product: Digital Recipe Book

More information about the project

","textFeedbackInput":"Mostrar retroalimentación","textFeedbackTextarea":""}

odeComponent.htmlView:
Digital safety

Before starting the project:

  • Do not publish personal information.
  • Use copyright-free images.
  • Respect other people's work.
  • Use digital tools responsibly.


Digital citizenship

  • Respect classmates online.
  • Communicate politely.
  • Protect your digital identity.
  • Use technology safely and responsibly.
odeComponent.jsonProperties:
{"ideviceId":"20260611122106028H4Y","textInfoDurationInput":"","textInfoDurationTextInput":"Duración","textInfoParticipantsInput":"","textInfoParticipantsTextInput":"Agrupamiento","textTextarea":"

Digital safety

Before starting the project:

  • Do not publish personal information.
  • Use copyright-free images.
  • Respect other people's work.
  • Use digital tools responsibly.


Digital citizenship

  • Respect classmates online.
  • Communicate politely.
  • Protect your digital identity.
  • Use technology safely and responsibly.
","textFeedbackInput":"Mostrar retroalimentación","textFeedbackTextarea":""}

odeComponent.htmlView:
Your challenge

Create a digital recipe book in English using Canva.

Each recipe must include:

  • Title
  • Ingredients
  • Instructions
  • Images
  • Imperative verbs
  • Sequence connectors
  • The recipe should be clear, well organised and visually attractive.
odeComponent.jsonProperties:
{"ideviceId":"202606111225265461ED","textInfoDurationInput":"","textInfoDurationTextInput":"Duración","textInfoParticipantsInput":"","textInfoParticipantsTextInput":"Agrupamiento","textTextarea":"

Your challenge

Create a digital recipe book in English using Canva.

Each recipe must include:

  • Title
  • Ingredients
  • Instructions
  • Images
  • Imperative verbs
  • Sequence connectors
  • The recipe should be clear, well organised and visually attractive.
","textFeedbackInput":"Mostrar retroalimentación","textFeedbackTextarea":""}

odeComponent.htmlView:
Información general sobre este recurso educativo
Título STEP BY STEP: CREATING A DIGITAL RECIPE BOOK
Descripción Recurso educativo abierto para la materia de inglés sobre textos instructivos, uso del imperativo, conectores de secuencia y el vocabulario relacionado con la comida.
Autoría Elena Irene Zamora Ramírez
Licencia creative commons: attribution - share alike 4.0

Este contenido fue creado con eXeLearning, el editor libre y de fuente abierta diseñado para crear recursos educativos.

Descargar el archivo .elpx

odeNavStructure.pageName: What are we going to learn?

odeNavStructureProperty.value: What are we going to learn?

odeComponent.htmlView:
• Imperative verbs.
  • Sequence connectors (first, then, next, finally...).
  • Instructional texts.
  • Digital content creation using Canva.

Why is this project useful?

Recipes are real-life instructional texts. Through this project you will improve your English communication skills while developing your digital competence.
odeComponent.jsonProperties:
{"ideviceId":"20260611121937093M0B","textInfoDurationInput":"","textInfoDurationTextInput":"Duración","textInfoParticipantsInput":"","textInfoParticipantsTextInput":"Agrupamiento","textTextarea":"


  • Imperative verbs.
  • Sequence connectors (first, then, next, finally...).
  • Instructional texts.
  • Digital content creation using Canva.

Why is this project useful?

Recipes are real-life instructional texts. Through this project you will improve your English communication skills while developing your digital competence.
